{
  "decision": "fail",

  "percent_complete": 100,

  "confidence": 0.95,

  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Missing load reactor on long motor leads",
    "Reflected wave phenomenon (dv/dt) causing voltage spikes at motor terminals",
    "Accelerated degradation of motor winding insulation"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the VFD system and lock out/tag out",
    "Install an engineered dV/dt filter or load reactor as specified by the manufacturer for long lead lengths",
    "Perform insulation resistance testing (megger) on the motor windings to assess existing degradation"
  ],
  "rationale": "Operating a VFD with long motor leads without a load reactor or dV/dt filter causes transient overvoltages (reflected wave phenomenon) that exceed the insulation rating of standard motors, leading to premature winding failure and potential ground faults.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430.120",
    "VFD Manufacturer Installation Manuals (Lead Length Guidelines)"
  ]
}
